title: FireplaceMode
description: Removes the save button if no campfire is near
body:
![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/8LD9v8i.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globoxwiki.com/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/FireplaceMode/issues)


FireplaceMode is a gamerule which disables the save button if the player is not close to a campfire. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/y8ZWQOx.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
